title: can't generate btor2 file for pulpissimo SoC's SRAM

features.name: large unpacked memory array
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked memory array where the total storage exceeds 128K bits (e.g., 1024 words x 128 bits)

features.name: memory initialization with nested for-loops and urandom
features.description: Code should include an initial block that initializes a large unpacked memory using nested for-loops and $urandom

features.name: multi_port memory with generate blocks
features.description: Code should include a generate block that creates multiple memory read ports using genvar and for-loops

features.name: variable part_select indexing on memory address
features.description: Code should include variable part-select indexing on a memory address port using the +: operator with computed offset

features.name: asynchronous read synchronous write memory
features.description: Code should include a memory with asynchronous read (via always @(*) or wire assignment) and synchronous write (via always @(posedge clk))
features.snippet:
always @(*) rdata_o = sram[addr_i];
always @(posedge clk_i) if (we_i) sram[addr_i] <= wdata_i;
